---
title: "Search Relevancy Weights"
output: html_document
date: Q42019
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r Connect to Server}
#Load Database -- needs to be done in 3.2.3
library(nzr)
nzConnect(machine='netezza.rei.com', database='DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS', user='glowney', password='xxxx')

# Disconnect
#nzDisconnect()

query_p=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_TOTAL WHERE PURCHASE_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_TOTAL WHERE PURCHASE_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")

query_i=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_TOTAL WHERE INTERACTION_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_TOTAL WHERE INTERACTION_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")

query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_TOTAL WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_TOTAL WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")

data_p=nzQuery(query_p)
data_i=nzQuery(query_i)
data_a=nzQuery(query_a)

save(data_p,file="data_p.RData")
save(data_i,file="data_i.RData")
save(data_a,file="data_a.RData")


```

```{r Load NavCat data}
query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_FOOTWEAR WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_FOOTWEAR WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")
data_a=nzQuery(query_a)
save(data_a,file="footwear_a.RData")

query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_BACKPACKS WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_BACKPACKS WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")
backpacks_a=nzQuery(query_a)
save(backpacks_a,file="backpacks_a.RData")

query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_SOCKS WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_SOCKS WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")
socks_a=nzQuery(query_a)
save(socks_a,file="socks_a.RData")

query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_TENTS WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_TENTS WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")
tents_a=nzQuery(query_a)
save(tents_a,file="tents_a.RData")

query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_WOMENS WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_WOMENS WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")
womens_a=nzQuery(query_a)
save(womens_a,file="womens_a.RData")

query_a=paste0("(SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_MENS WHERE ATC_FLAG=1 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000) UNION ALL (SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_MENS WHERE ATC_FLAG=0 ORDER BY RAND_NUM LIMIT 3000000)")
mens_a=nzQuery(query_a)
save(mens_a,file="mens_a.RData")


```

```{r New Variables}
backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group=0
backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group=ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT==0,"0", ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT>0 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT<=4,"1-4", ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT>=5 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT<=10,"5-10", ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT>=11 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT<=20,"11-20",
ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT>=21 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT<=50,"21-50","over50")))))

###
backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group=0
backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group=ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT<76, backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_COUNT,"over75")

backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group=as.factor(backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group)

review_counts=as.data.frame(table(backpacks_balanced_a$review_count_group))
plot(review_counts$Var1,review_counts$Freq)



backpacks_balanced_a$review_score_group=0
backpacks_balanced_a$review_score_group=ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE==0,"0", ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE>0 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE<3.5,"1-3.5", ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE>=3.5 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE<4.5,"3.5-4.5",
ifelse(backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE>=4.5 & backpacks_balanced_a$REVIEW_SCORE<6,"4.5-5","empty"))))

backpacks_balanced_a$review_score_group=as.factor(backpacks_balanced_a$review_score_group)

review_counts=as.data.frame(table(backpacks_balanced_a$review_score_group))
plot(review_counts$Var1,review_counts$Freq)

```


```{r EXPLORATORY: Check Data Vars}
### prediction vars
purchase_flag=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PURCHASE_FLAG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
#   PURCHASE_FLAG    COUNT
# 1             0 60,829,263
# 2             1  2,250,499


atc_flag=nzQuery(
          "SELECT ATC_FLAG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
#   ATC_FLAG    COUNT
# 1        0 56,902,131
# 2        1  6,177,631

interaction_flag=nzQuery(
          "SELECT INTERACTION_FLAG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
#   INTERACTION_FLAG    COUNT
# 1                0 46,989,714
# 2                1 16,090,048

### date fields
date_key=nzQuery(
          "SELECT DATE_KEY,EVENT_FLAG, count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2"
)
date_key=date_key[order(date_key$DATE_KEY),]
date_key$date=as.Date(as.character(date_key$DATE_KEY),"%Y%m%d")
date_key$COUNT=as.integer(date_key$COUNT)
plot(x=date_key$date,y=date_key$COUNT,type = "l", ylab="Obs Count", xlab="PDP View Date")
events=date_key[which(date_key$EVENT_FLAG==1),]
points(x=events$date,y=events$COUNT,type = "p", col="red")

date_name=nzQuery(
          "SELECT FISCAL_DAY_NAME,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
week_order=c("Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday")
require("dplyr")
week_name=date_name %>%
  mutate(FISCAL_DAY_NAME =  factor(trimws(FISCAL_DAY_NAME), levels = week_order)) %>%
  arrange(FISCAL_DAY_NAME)    
plot(as.factor(week_name$FISCAL_DAY_NAME),as.integer(week_name$COUNT))

weekday_bucket=nzQuery(
          "SELECT WEEKDAY_BUCKET,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
week_bucket=c("Monday", "Midweek", "Weekend")
require("dplyr")
weekbucket_name=weekday_bucket %>%
  mutate(WEEKDAY_BUCKET =  factor(trimws(WEEKDAY_BUCKET), levels = week_bucket)) %>%
  arrange(WEEKDAY_BUCKET)    
plot(as.factor(weekbucket_name$WEEKDAY_BUCKET),as.integer(weekbucket_name$COUNT))


event_flag=nzQuery(
          "SELECT EVENT_FLAG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

### State
state=nzQuery(
          "SELECT STATE_NAME,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
state$COUNT=as.integer(state$COUNT)
state$STATE_NAME=as.factor(state$STATE_NAME)
state=state[order(state$COUNT,decreasing =T),]
require(data.table)
max_states=state[which(state$STATE_NAME %in% head(state, 5)$STATE_NAME),]
plot(state$STATE_NAME,state$COUNT)
text(x=max_states$STATE_NAME, y=(max_states$COUNT-500000), col="green4", labels=max_states$STATE_NAME)


district=nzQuery(
          "SELECT DISTRICT_NAME,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
district$COUNT=as.integer(district$COUNT)
district$DISTRICT_NAME=as.factor(district$DISTRICT_NAME)
district=district[order(district$COUNT,decreasing =T),]
require(data.table)
max_district=district[which(district$DISTRICT_NAME %in% head(district, 3)$DISTRICT_NAME),]
plot(district$DISTRICT_NAME,district$COUNT)
text(x=max_district$DISTRICT_NAME, y=(max_district$COUNT-500000), col="green4", labels=max_district$DISTRICT_NAME)

### Product
product=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PRODUCT,PRICE_BAND,PRODUCT_NAME, count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2,3"
)
product$PRODUCT=as.factor(product$PRODUCT)
product$COUNT=as.integer(product$COUNT)

bands=unique(na.omit(product$PRICE_BAND))

for(i in 1:length(bands)){
  band=bands[i]
  productXband=product[which(product$PRICE_BAND==band),]
  print(band)
  print(mean(productXband$COUNT))
  print(median(productXband$COUNT))
  productXband=productXband[order(productXband$COUNT, decreasing=T),]
  max_products=head(productXband, 3)
  plot(productXband$PRODUCT,productXband$COUNT, main=paste0(band))
  text(x=max_products$PRODUCT, y=(max_products$COUNT-100), col="magenta",cex=.75, label=max_products$PRODUCT_NAME)
  
}


price_band=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PRICE_BAND,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
price_band_Data$PRICE_BAND=as.factor(price_band_Data$PRICE_BAND)
price_band_Data$COUNT=as.integer(price_band_Data$COUNT)
plot(price_band_Data$PRICE_BAND,price_band_Data$COUNT)

brand=nzQuery(
          "SELECT BRAND_CAT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
brand$BRAND_CAT=as.factor(brand$BRAND_CAT)
brand$BRAND_CLEAN=apply(brand[,"BRAND_CAT",drop=F],1 ,function(x) gsub("\\(.+", "", x))
brand$COUNT=as.integer(brand$COUNT)
plot(x=brand$BRAND_CAT, y=brand$COUNT, type="h", ylim=c(0,40000000))
text(x=brand$BRAND_CAT, y=(brand$COUNT+3000000), col="dodgerblue2", labels=brand$BRAND_CLEAN)


sku_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT TOTAL_SKU_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
sku_count$TOTAL_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(sku_count$TOTAL_SKU_COUNT)
sku_count$COUNT=as.integer(sku_count$COUNT)
sku_count=sku_count[order(sku_count$COUNT, decreasing=T),]
plot(sku_count$TOTAL_SKU_COUNT,sku_count$COUNT, xlab="Total Sku Count", ylab="Obs Count")

sale_sku_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SALE_SKU_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
sale_sku_count$SALE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(sale_sku_count$SALE_SKU_COUNT)
sale_sku_count$COUNT=as.integer(sale_sku_count$COUNT)
sale_sku_count=sale_sku_count[order(sale_sku_count$COUNT, decreasing=T),]
plot(sale_sku_count$SALE_SKU_COUNT,sale_sku_count$COUNT, xlab="Sale Sku Count", ylab="Obs Count")

clearance_sku_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
clearance_sku_count$CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(clearance_sku_count$CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT)
clearance_sku_count$COUNT=as.integer(clearance_sku_count$COUNT)
clearance_sku_count=clearance_sku_count[order(clearance_sku_count$COUNT, decreasing=T),]
plot(clearance_sku_count$CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT,clearance_sku_count$COUNT, xlab="clearance Sku Count", ylab="Obs Count")

super_clear_sku_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
super_clear_sku_count$SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(super_clear_sku_count$SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT)
super_clear_sku_count$COUNT=as.integer(super_clear_sku_count$COUNT)
super_clear_sku_count=super_clear_sku_count[order(super_clear_sku_count$COUNT, decreasing=T),]
plot(super_clear_sku_count$SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT,super_clear_sku_count$COUNT, xlab="Super clearance Sku Count", ylab="Obs Count")

outlet_sku_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT OUTLET_SKU_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

regular_sku_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT REGULAR_SKU_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
regular_sku_count$REGULAR_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(regular_sku_count$REGULAR_SKU_COUNT)
regular_sku_count$COUNT=as.integer(regular_sku_count$COUNT)
regular_sku_count=regular_sku_count[order(regular_sku_count$COUNT, decreasing=T),]
plot(regular_sku_count$REGULAR_SKU_COUNT,regular_sku_count$COUNT, xlab="Regular Sku Count", ylab="Obs Count")


size_count=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SIZE_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

size_count180=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SIZE_COUNT_180,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

size_percent=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SIZE_COUNT, SIZE_COUNT_180, count(*) as COUNT FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING group by 1,2"
)
size_percent$SIZE_COUNT=as.integer(size_percent$SIZE_COUNT)
size_percent$SIZE_COUNT_180=as.integer(size_percent$SIZE_COUNT_180)
size_percent$COUNT=as.integer(size_percent$COUNT)

size_percent$ratio=0
for(i in 1:nrow(size_percent)){
if(size_percent$SIZE_COUNT_180[i]==0){
  size_percent$ratio[i]=1
}
else if (size_percent$SIZE_COUNT[i]==0){
  size_percent$ratio[i]=0
}
else {
  size_percent$ratio[i]= size_percent$SIZE_COUNT[i]/size_percent$SIZE_COUNT_180[i]
}
}
require("dplyr")
percent=size_percent %>%
        group_by(ratio) %>%
        summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
percent=as.data.frame(percent)
plot(percent$ratio,percent$count)

search_entry=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

entry=nzQuery(
          "SELECT ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
entry$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP=as.factor(entry$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP)
entry$COUNT=as.integer(entry$COUNT)
plot(entry$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP,entry$COUNT)


device=nzQuery(
          "SELECT DEVICE_TYPE,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

max_sku=nzQuery(
          "SELECT MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
max_sku$MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF=round(as.numeric(max_sku$MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF),2)
max_sku$COUNT=as.integer(max_sku$COUNT)
require("dplyr")
max_sku=max_sku %>%
        group_by(MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF) %>%
        summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
plot(max_sku$MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF, max_sku$count)
max_sku=max_sku[order(max_sku$MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF, decreasing=TRUE),]
outliers=head(max_sku,n=3)
text(outliers$MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF, outliers$count+2500000, labels=outliers$MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF, col="darkred")

min_sku=nzQuery(
          "SELECT MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
min_sku$MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF=round(as.numeric(min_sku$MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF),2)
min_sku$COUNT=as.integer(min_sku$COUNT)
require("dplyr")
min_sku=min_sku %>%
        group_by(MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF) %>%
        summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
plot(min_sku$MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF, min_sku$count)

age=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PRODUCT_AGE_DAYS,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
age$PRODUCT_AGE_DAYS=as.integer(age$PRODUCT_AGE_DAYS)
age$COUNT=as.integer(age$COUNT)
plot(age$PRODUCT_AGE_DAYS, age$COUNT)

age_cat=nzQuery(
          "SELECT AGE_CATEGORY,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
age_cat$AGE_CATEGORY=as.factor(age_cat$AGE_CATEGORY)
age_cat$COUNT=as.integer(age_cat$COUNT)
plot(age_cat$AGE_CATEGORY, age_cat$COUNT)

gender=nzQuery(
          "SELECT GENDER,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
gender$GENDER=as.factor(gender$GENDER)
gender$COUNT=as.integer(gender$COUNT)
plot(gender$GENDER, gender$COUNT)

review=nzQuery(
          "SELECT REVIEW_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
review$REVIEW_COUNT=as.factor(review$REVIEW_COUNT)
review$COUNT=as.integer(review$COUNT)
plot(review$REVIEW_COUNT, review$COUNT)

score=nzQuery(
          "SELECT REVIEW_SCORE,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
score$REVIEW_SCORE=round(as.numeric(score$REVIEW_SCORE),2)
score$COUNT=as.integer(score$COUNT)
require("dplyr")
score=score %>%
        group_by(REVIEW_SCORE) %>%
        summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
plot(score$REVIEW_SCORE, score$count)
score=score[order(score$REVIEW_SCORE),]


shop=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SHOP_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
shop$SHOP_DESC=as.factor(shop$SHOP_DESC)
shop$COUNT=as.integer(shop$COUNT)
shop=shop[order(shop$COUNT, decreasing = T),]
plot(shop$SHOP_DESC, shop$COUNT)
text(x=shop$SHOP_DESC[1:4], y=shop$COUNT[1:4]-1500000, labels=head(shop$SHOP_DESC,n=4), col="blue")

shop_price=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SHOP_PRICE_AVG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
shop_price$SHOP_PRICE_AVG=round(as.numeric(shop_price$SHOP_PRICE_AVG),2)
shop_price$COUNT=as.integer(shop_price$COUNT)
shop_price=shop_price[order(shop_price$SHOP_PRICE_AVG),]
shop_price=shop_price %>%
          group_by(SHOP_PRICE_AVG) %>%
          summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
plot(shop_price$SHOP_PRICE_AVG, shop_price$count)


class=nzQuery(
          "SELECT CLASS_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
class$CLASS_DESC=as.factor(class$CLASS_DESC)
class$COUNT=as.integer(class$COUNT)
class=class[order(class$COUNT, decreasing = T),]
plot(class$CLASS_DESC, class$COUNT)
text(x=class$CLASS_DESC[1:4], y=class$COUNT[1:4]-10000, labels=head(class$CLASS_DESC,n=3), col="blue", cex=.7)


class_price=nzQuery(
          "SELECT CLASS_PRICE_AVG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
class_price$CLASS_PRICE_AVG=round(as.numeric(class_price$CLASS_PRICE_AVG),2)
class_price$COUNT=as.integer(class_price$COUNT)
class_price=class_price[order(class_price$CLASS_PRICE_AVG),]
class_price=class_price %>%
          group_by(CLASS_PRICE_AVG) %>%
          summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
plot(class_price$CLASS_PRICE_AVG, class_price$count)


dept=nzQuery(
          "SELECT DEPARTMENT_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
dept$DEPARTMENT_DESC=as.factor(dept$DEPARTMENT_DESC)
dept$COUNT=as.integer(dept$COUNT)
dept=dept[order(dept$COUNT, decreasing = T),]
plot(dept$DEPARTMENT_DESC, dept$COUNT)
text(x=dept$DEPARTMENT_DESC[1:8], y=dept$COUNT[1:8]-180000, labels=head(dept$DEPARTMENT_DESC,n=8), col="blue", cex=.7)


dept_price=nzQuery(
          "SELECT DEPARTMENT_DESC,DEPT_PRICE_AVG,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2"
)
dept_price$DEPT_PRICE_AVG=round(as.numeric(dept_price$DEPT_PRICE_AVG),2)
dept_price$COUNT=as.integer(dept_price$COUNT)
dept_price=dept_price %>%
          group_by(DEPARTMENT_DESC,DEPT_PRICE_AVG) %>%
          summarise(count=sum(COUNT))
dept_price=dept_price[order(dept_price$DEPT_PRICE_AVG,decreasing=T),]
plot(dept_price$DEPT_PRICE_AVG, dept_price$count)
text(x=dept_price$DEPT_PRICE_AVG[1:3], y=dept_price$count[1:3]-150000, labels=head(dept_price$DEPARTMENT_DESC,n=3), col="gold4")


pdp_size=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
pdp_size$PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT=as.integer(pdp_size$PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT)
pdp_size$COUNT=as.integer(pdp_size$COUNT)
plot(pdp_size$PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT,pdp_size$COUNT)

pdp_color=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
pdp_color$PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT=as.integer(pdp_color$PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT)
pdp_color$COUNT=as.integer(pdp_color$COUNT)
plot(pdp_color$PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT,pdp_color$COUNT)



SESSIONS_VIEWED_60=nzQuery(
          "SELECT distinct DATE_KEY,SESSIONS_VIEWED_60 as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING WHERE PRODUCT=100030"
)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$SESSIONS_VIEWED_60=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$SESSIONS_VIEWED_60)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$COUNT=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$COUNT)
plot(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$SESSIONS_VIEWED_60, SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$COUNT)


SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$DATE_KEY=as.Date(as.character(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$DATE_KEY),"%Y%m%d")
SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$COUNT=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$COUNT)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_60=SESSIONS_VIEWED_60[order(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$DATE_KEY),]
plot(SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$DATE_KEY,SESSIONS_VIEWED_60$COUNT, type="b")


SESSIONS_VIEWED_30=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SESSIONS_VIEWED_30,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_30$SESSIONS_VIEWED_30=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_30$SESSIONS_VIEWED_30)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_30$COUNT=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_30$COUNT)
plot(SESSIONS_VIEWED_30$SESSIONS_VIEWED_30, SESSIONS_VIEWED_30$COUNT)


SESSIONS_VIEWED_10=nzQuery(
          "SELECT PRODUCT,SESSIONS_VIEWED_10,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_10$SESSIONS_VIEWED_10=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_10$SESSIONS_VIEWED_10)
SESSIONS_VIEWED_10$COUNT=as.integer(SESSIONS_VIEWED_10$COUNT)
plot(SESSIONS_VIEWED_10$SESSIONS_VIEWED_10, SESSIONS_VIEWED_10$COUNT)


SESSIONS_CONV_60=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SESSIONS_CONV_60,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)


SESSIONS_CONV_30=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SESSIONS_CONV_30,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)

SESSIONS_CONV_10=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SESSIONS_CONV_10,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1"
)


silh=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SHOP_DESC, SILHOUETTE_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2"
)
s_table=table(a=silh$SHOP_DESC, b=silh$SILHOUETTE_DESC)

value=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SHOP_DESC, VALUE_TIER_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2"
)

activity=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SHOP_DESC, PRIMARY_ACTIVITY_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2"
)

skill=nzQuery(
          "SELECT SHOP_DESC, SKILL_LEVEL_DESC,count(*) as count FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING GROUP BY 1,2"
)

# Disconnect
#nzDisconnect()

```

```{r SETUP: Reformat Functions}
reformat_rf=function(data=data){
  data$ SIZE_COUNT=as.integer(data$ SIZE_COUNT)
  data$ SIZE_COUNT_180=as.integer(data$ SIZE_COUNT_180)
  data$size_percent=ifelse(data$SIZE_COUNT_180==0, 1,ifelse(data$SIZE_COUNT==0, 0, data$SIZE_COUNT/data$SIZE_COUNT_180))  ##add Size Percent Complete based on sizes 6mos ago
  data$ SEASON=as.factor(data$ SEASON)
  data$ PRICE_BAND=as.factor(data$ PRICE_BAND)
  data$ DISTRICT_NAME=as.factor(data$ DISTRICT_NAME)
  data$ STATE_NAME=as.factor(data$ STATE_NAME)
  data$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS=ifelse(is.na(data$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS),"UNKNOWN",data$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS)
  data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS=ifelse(is.na(data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS),"UNKNOWN",data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS)
  data$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS=as.factor(data$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS)
  data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS=as.factor(data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS)
  
  data$ PURCHASE_FLAG=as.factor(data$ PURCHASE_FLAG)
  data$ ATC_FLAG=as.factor(data$ ATC_FLAG)
  data$ INTERACTION_FLAG=as.factor(data$ INTERACTION_FLAG)
  
  data$EVENT_FLAG=as.factor(data$EVENT_FLAG)
  data$ ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP=as.factor(data$ ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP)
  data$ PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT=as.integer(data$ PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT)
  data$ PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT=as.integer(data$ PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT)
  data$ BRAND_CAT=as.factor(data$ BRAND_CAT)
  data$ SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG=as.factor(data$ SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG)
  data$ FISCAL_DAY_NAME=as.factor(data$ FISCAL_DAY_NAME)
  data$ WEEKDAY=as.factor(data$ WEEKDAY)
  
  data$ MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF=as.numeric(data$ MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF)
  data$ MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF=as.numeric(data$ MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF)
  data$ SALE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(data$ SALE_SKU_COUNT)
  data$ TOTAL_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(data$ TOTAL_SKU_COUNT)
  data$ CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(data$ CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT)
  data$ SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(data$ SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT)
  data$ TOTAL_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(data$ TOTAL_SKU_COUNT)
  data$ REGULAR_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(data$ REGULAR_SKU_COUNT)
  data$ REVIEW_COUNT=as.integer(data$ REVIEW_COUNT)
  data$ REVIEW_SCORE=as.numeric(data$ REVIEW_SCORE)
  data$ GENDER=as.factor(data$ GENDER)
  data$ USA_FLAG=as.factor(data$ USA_FLAG)
  data$ CHINA_FLAG=as.factor(data$ CHINA_FLAG)
  data$ AGE_CATEGORY=as.factor(data$ AGE_CATEGORY)
  data$ SHOP_DESC=as.factor(data$ SHOP_DESC)
  data$ DEPARTMENT_DESC=as.factor(data$ DEPARTMENT_DESC)
  data$ CLASS_DESC=as.factor(data$ CLASS_DESC)
  
  data$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_60=as.integer(data$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_60)
  data$ SESSIONS_CONV_10=as.integer(data$ SESSIONS_CONV_10)
    data$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_30=as.integer(data$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_30)
  data$ SESSIONS_CONV_30=as.integer(data$ SESSIONS_CONV_30)
    data$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_10=as.integer(data$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_10)
  data$ SESSIONS_CONV_60=as.integer(data$ SESSIONS_CONV_60)
  
  data$ MAX_SKU_PRICE=as.numeric(data$ MAX_SKU_PRICE)
  data$ SHOP_PRICE_AVG=as.numeric(data$SHOP_PRICE_AVG)
  data$ DEPT_PRICE_AVG=as.numeric(data$DEPT_PRICE_AVG)
  data$ CLASS_PRICE_AVG=as.numeric(data$CLASS_PRICE_AVG)
  
  data$AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT=as.numeric(data$AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT)
  data$AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT=as.numeric(data$AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT)
  
  data$AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT=as.numeric(round(data$AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT,1))
  data$AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT=as.numeric(round(data$AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT,1))
  
  data$sku_ratio_to_dept=data$TOTAL_SKU_COUNT/data$AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT
  data$sku_ratio_to_class=data$TOTAL_SKU_COUNT/data$AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT
  
  data$price_ratio_to_shop=data$ MAX_SKU_PRICE/data$SHOP_PRICE_AVG
  data$price_ratio_to_class=data$ MAX_SKU_PRICE/data$CLASS_PRICE_AVG
  data$price_ratio_to_dept=data$ MAX_SKU_PRICE/data$DEPT_PRICE_AVG
  data$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL = as.factor(data$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL)
  data$STORE_FLAG= as.factor(data$STORE_FLAG)
  data$RR_FLAG= as.factor(data$RR_FLAG)
  data$ON_SALE_FLAG = as.factor(data$ON_SALE_FLAG)
  data$DEVICE_TYPE=as.factor(data$DEVICE_TYPE)
  return(data)
  
}

reformat_mba=function(total=data){
  total$EVENT_FLAG[which(total$EVENT_FLAG==1)]="Event"
  total$EVENT_FLAG[which(total$EVENT_FLAG==0)]="NonEvent"
  total$EVENT_FLAG=as.factor(total$EVENT_FLAG)
  
  total$DEVICE_TYPE=as.factor(total$DEVICE_TYPE)
  total$PRICE_BAND=as.factor(total$PRICE_BAND)
  total$STATE_NAME=ifelse(is.na(total$STATE_NAME),"UNKNOWN",total$STATE_NAME)
  total$DISTRICT_NAME=ifelse(is.na(total$DISTRICT_NAME),"UNKNOWN",total$DISTRICT_NAME)
  total$ STATE_NAME=as.factor(total$ STATE_NAME)
  total$ DISTRICT_NAME=as.factor(total$ DISTRICT_NAME)
  
  total$ FISCAL_DAY_NAME=as.factor(total$ FISCAL_DAY_NAME)
  total$ WEEKDAY_P=as.factor(total$ WEEKDAY_P)  
  total$ ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP=as.factor(total$ ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP)
  total$ BRAND_CAT=as.factor(total$ BRAND_CAT)  
  
  total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS=ifelse(is.na(total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS),"UNKNOWN",total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS)
  total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS==0)]="0 Stores-30min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS==1)]="1 Stores-30min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS %in% c(2,3))]="2-3 Stores-30min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS>=4)]="4+ Stores-30min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS=as.factor(total$STORES_WITHIN_30MINS)
  
  total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS=ifelse(is.na(total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS),"UNKNOWN",total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS)
  total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS==0)]="0 Stores-60min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS==1)]="1 Stores-60min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS %in% c(2,3))]="2-3 Stores-60min"
  total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS[which(total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS>=4)]="4+ Stores-60min"  
  total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS=as.factor(total$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS)

  total$PURCHASE_FLAG[which(total$PURCHASE_FLAG==1)]="Purchase"
  total$PURCHASE_FLAG[which(total$PURCHASE_FLAG==0)]="No Purchase"  
  total$ PURCHASE_FLAG=as.factor(total$ PURCHASE_FLAG)

  total$ATC_FLAG[which(total$ATC_FLAG==1)]="ATC"
  total$ATC_FLAG[which(total$ATC_FLAG==0)]="No ATC"    
  total$ ATC_FLAG=as.factor(total$ ATC_FLAG)
  
  total$INTERACTION_FLAG[which(total$INTERACTION_FLAG==1)]="Interaction"
  total$INTERACTION_FLAG[which(total$INTERACTION_FLAG==0)]="No Interaction"
  total$ INTERACTION_FLAG=as.factor(total$ INTERACTION_FLAG)

  total$SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG[which(total$SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG==1)]="Search Entry"
  total$SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG[which(total$SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG==0)]="Non Search Entry"
  total$ SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG=as.factor(total$ SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG)
  total$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL = as.factor(total$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL)
  total$ AGE_CATEGORY=as.factor(total$ AGE_CATEGORY)  
  total$ GENDER=as.factor(total$ GENDER) 
  
  total$STORE_FLAG[which(total$STORE_FLAG==1)]="Find In Store Click"
  total$STORE_FLAG[which(total$STORE_FLAG==0)]="No Find In Store Click"
  total$STORE_FLAG= as.factor(total$STORE_FLAG)
  
  total$ON_SALE_FLAG[which(total$ON_SALE_FLAG==1)]="On Sale"
  total$ON_SALE_FLAG[which(total$ON_SALE_FLAG==0)]="Regular Price"
  total$ON_SALE_FLAG = as.factor(total$ON_SALE_FLAG)
  
  total$ SHOP_DESC=as.factor(total$ SHOP_DESC)
  total$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL = as.factor(total$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL)
  
  return(total)
}

```

```{r SETUP: RF Functions}
###### FUNCTIONS #######
########################
#Test/train
split=function(seed=123, data=one_na, train=.7){
  set.seed(seed)
  train_ind=sample(seq_len(nrow(data)), size = round(nrow(data)*train))

  return=list()
  return$train=data[train_ind, ]
  return$test=data[-train_ind, ]
  return(return)
}


#RF
require('ranger')
require("dplyr")
rf_function=function(label="one_p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=train, vars=vars, test=test, seed=123, num.trees=25){
  list=list()
  label=label
  if(y=="PURCHASE_FLAG"){
  rf_ranger=ranger(PURCHASE_FLAG~., data = data[,c("PURCHASE_FLAG",vars)], 
                   importance = "impurity",
                   num.trees = num.trees, 
                    write.forest = TRUE, 
                    respect.unordered.factors = TRUE, 
                    verbose = TRUE,
                    seed=seed)
  test1=test[,c("PURCHASE_FLAG",vars)]
  }
  
  else if(y=="ATC_FLAG"){
  rf_ranger=ranger(ATC_FLAG~., data = data[,c("ATC_FLAG",vars)], 
                   importance = "impurity",
                   num.trees = num.trees, 
                    write.forest = TRUE, 
                    respect.unordered.factors = TRUE, 
                    verbose = TRUE,
                    seed=seed)
  
  test1=test[,c("ATC_FLAG",vars)]
  }
  
  else if(y=="INTERACTION_FLAG"){
  rf_ranger=ranger(INTERACTION_FLAG~., data = data[,c("INTERACTION_FLAG",vars)], 
                   importance = "impurity",
                   num.trees = num.trees, 
                    write.forest = TRUE, 
                    respect.unordered.factors = TRUE, 
                    verbose = TRUE,
                    seed=seed)
  
  test1=test[,c("INTERACTION_FLAG",vars)]
  }
  
  imp_ranger=importance(rf_ranger)
  imp_ranger_frame=data.frame(imp_ranger)[order(imp_ranger, decreasing=T),,drop = FALSE]
  #save(rf_ranger,file = paste0(label,"-",seed,"_rf.RData"))
  #save(imp_ranger_frame,file = paste0(label,"-",seed,"_rfImportance.RData"))
  
  pred=predict(rf_ranger, data=test1, predict.all = FALSE,
                num.trees=num.trees, type = "response", se.method = "infjack", 
                quantiles = c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9),
                seed=seed)
  output=cbind(pred$predictions,test1[,1], pred$predictions==test1[,1])
  accuracy=prop.table(table(output[,3]))
  #save(accuracy,file = paste0(label,"-",seed,"_rfAccuracy.RData"))
  
  list$data_size=nrow(data)
  list$rf=rf_ranger
  list$accuracy=accuracy
  list$imp=imp_ranger_frame
  return(list)
}

#Ouptut Table
output_table_setup=function(data=purchase_seg, col_names=c("device","event"), vars=vars){
  colnames(data)=col_names
  data$train_size=0
  data$accuracy=0
  
  for(i in 1:length(vars)){
    data$i=0
    colnames(data)[ncol(data)]=vars[i]
  }
  
  return(data)
}

#Balance data sample
require("ROSE")
#balanceIt=function(data=data_clean_p, seed=1, success="PURCHASE_FLAG"){
  
  if(success=="PURCHASE_FLAG"){
    data_balanced1=ovun.sample(PURCHASE_FLAG ~ ., data = data, method = "both",seed = seed)$data
    return(data_balanced1)
  } else if(success=="ATC_FLAG"){
      data_balanced1=ovun.sample(ATC_FLAG ~ ., data = data, method = "both",seed = seed)$data
      return(data_balanced1)
  } else if(success=="INTERACTION_FLAG"){
      data_balanced1=ovun.sample(INTERACTION_FLAG ~ ., data = data, method = "both",seed = seed)$data
      return(data_balanced1)
  }
  
  # data_balanced1$Marketing_Flag=0
  # data_balanced1$Marketing_Flag[which(data_balanced1$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP %in% c("Email","Error/Other"))]=1
  # data_balanced1=ovun.sample(Marketing_Flag ~ ., data = data_balanced1, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
  # 
  # data_balanced1$geo=0
  # data_balanced1$geo[which(data_balanced1$geo_group ==5)]=1
  # data_balanced1=ovun.sample(geo ~ ., data = data_balanced1, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
  # 
  # data_balanced1$Marketing_Flag=0
  # data_balanced1$Marketing_Flag[which(data_balanced1$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP %in% c("Email","Direct Load"))]=1
  # data_balanced=ovun.sample(Marketing_Flag ~ ., data = data_balanced1, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
  
  #return(data_balanced1)
}

#Add geo var
#geo_group=function(data=data){
  data$geo_group=0
  data$geo_group=ifelse(data$STATE_NAME=="DE",1, ifelse(data$STATE_NAME=="UNKNOWN",2, ifelse(data$STATE_NAME %in% c("VT","ME","LA","NH"),3, ifelse(data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS==0,4,5))))
  data$geo_group=as.factor(data$geo_group)
  return(data$geo_group)
}

#RF Model Run
run_model=function(segment=purchase_seg, query=query, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70){
  
  total_list=list()
for(i in 1:nrow(segment)){
  Device=segment$device[i]
  Event=segment$event[i]
  Marketing=segment$marketing[i]
  Geo=segment$geo[i]
  Dept=segment$dept[i]
  
  ###Pull data from database
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=seed, success=success)
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="-", y=success, data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=seed, num.trees=trees)
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(segment)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      segment[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        segment[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(segment)[j]
      segment[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  
}
  total_list$segment=segment
  return(total_list)
  
}

```

```{r MAINT: New Geo Var}

#data_clean

# Geos	
# {DE}	More Likely to Purchase
# {UNKNOWN}	Less Likely to Purchase & ATC
# {VT, ME, LA, NH}	Less Likely to Interact
# {AL, AR, FL, GA, HI, IL, KY, NJ, TN, TX}	More Likely On Mobile
# {0 Stores-60min}	?


data$geo_group=0
data$geo_group=ifelse(data$STATE_NAME=="DE",1, ifelse(data$STATE_NAME=="UNKNOWN",2, ifelse(data$STATE_NAME %in% c("VT","ME","LA","NH"),3, ifelse(data$STORES_WITHIN_60MINS==0,4,5))))
data$geo_group=as.factor(data$geo_group)
table(data_clean$geo_group)

save(data_clean,file="Data_Clean.RData")

```

```{r MAINT: Fix class imbalance}
#https://www.analyticsvidhya.com/blog/2016/03/practical-guide-deal-imbalanced-classification-problems/

####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
# SETUP: Reformat Functions
# SETUP: Vars List

####### Sampling Algos ########
################################
#install.packages("ROSE")
require("ROSE")

#load("~/SRW/Segment 1/Full_Data.RData")
data_clean_p=reformat_rf(data_p)
data_clean_i=reformat_rf(data_i)
data_clean_a=reformat_rf(data_a)

save(data_clean_p,file="data_clean_p.RData")
save(data_clean_i,file="data_clean_i.RData")
save(data_clean_a,file="data_clean_a.RData")

vars=c("SIZE_COUNT",
  "SIZE_COUNT_180",
  "size_percent",
  "PRICE_BAND",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "STATE_NAME",
  "STORES_WITHIN_30MINS",
  "STORES_WITHIN_60MINS",
  "STORES_WITHIN_30MINS",
  "STORES_WITHIN_60MINS",
  "PURCHASE_FLAG",
  "ATC_FLAG",
  "INTERACTION_FLAG",
  "EVENT_FLAG",
  "ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP",
  "PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT",
  "PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT",
  "BRAND_CAT",
  "SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG",
  "FISCAL_DAY_NAME",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF",
  "MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF",
  "SALE_SKU_COUNT",
  "CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT",
  "SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT",
  "TOTAL_SKU_COUNT",
  "REGULAR_SKU_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_SCORE",
  "GENDER",
  "USA_FLAG",
  "CHINA_FLAG",
  "AGE_CATEGORY",
  "SHOP_DESC",
  "DEPARTMENT_DESC",
  "CLASS_DESC",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_60",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_10",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_30",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_30",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_10",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_60",
  "MAX_SKU_PRICE",
  "SHOP_PRICE_AVG",
  "DEPT_PRICE_AVG",
  "CLASS_PRICE_AVG",
  "AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT",
  "AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT",
  "AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT",
  "AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT",
  "sku_ratio_to_dept",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",
  "price_ratio_to_shop",
  "price_ratio_to_class",
  "price_ratio_to_dept",
  "SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL",
  "STORE_FLAG",
  "RR_FLAG",
  "ON_SALE_FLAG",
  "DEVICE_TYPE", "SEASON"
)


####### PURCHASE ########
#########################
data_clean_p2=data_clean_p[,c("PURCHASE_FLAG",vars)]
prop.table(table(data_clean_p2$PURCHASE_FLAG)) #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_p2$EVENT_FLAG))  #ok balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_p2$DEVICE_TYPE)) #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_p2$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP))  #not balanced

#Under and Over Sampling
data_balanced=ovun.sample(DEVICE_TYPE ~ ., data = data_clean_p2,method = "both",seed = 1)$data
#data_balanced=ovun.sample(DEVICE_TYPE ~ ., data = data_balanced,N=5500000,  method = "both",seed = 1)$data

# data_balanced$Marketing_Flag=0
# data_balanced$Marketing_Flag[which(data_balanced$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP %in% c("Email","Direct Load"))]=1
# data_balanced=ovun.sample(Marketing_Flag ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data

prop.table(table(data_balanced$PURCHASE_FLAG)) #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$EVENT_FLAG))  #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$DEVICE_TYPE)) #balanced
#prop.table(table(data_balanced$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP))  #meh

data_balanced_p=data_balanced
save(data_balanced_p,file="data_balanced_p.RData")


####### ATC ########
####################
data_clean_a2=data_clean_a[,c("ATC_FLAG",vars)]
prop.table(table(data_clean_a2$ATC_FLAG)) #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_a2$EVENT_FLAG))  #ok balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_a2$DEVICE_TYPE)) #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_a2$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP))  #not balanced

#Under and Over Sampling
#data_balanced=ovun.sample(ATC_FLAG ~ ., data = data_clean_a,N=5000000, method = "over",seed = 1)$data
#data_balanced=ovun.sample(EVENT_FLAG ~ ., data = data_balanced, N=5000000,method = "both",seed = 1)$data
data_balanced=ovun.sample(DEVICE_TYPE ~ ., data = data_clean_a2, method = "both",seed = 1)$data

# data_balanced$Marketing_Flag=0
# data_balanced$Marketing_Flag[which(data_balanced$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP %in% c("Direct Load","Organic Search"))]=1
# data_balanced=ovun.sample(Marketing_Flag ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data

prop.table(table(data_balanced$ATC_FLAG)) #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$EVENT_FLAG))  #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$DEVICE_TYPE)) #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP))  #meh

data_balanced_a=data_balanced
save(data_balanced_a,file="data_balanced_a.RData")


###### INTERACTION ######
#########################
data_clean_i2=data_clean_i[,c("INTERACTION_FLAG",vars)]
prop.table(table(data_clean_i2$INTERACTION_FLAG)) #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_i2$EVENT_FLAG))  #ok balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_i2$DEVICE_TYPE)) #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_clean_i2$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP))  #not balanced

#Under and Over Sampling
#data_balanced=ovun.sample(INTERACTION_FLAG ~ ., data = data_clean_i, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
#data_balanced=ovun.sample(EVENT_FLAG ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
data_balanced=ovun.sample(DEVICE_TYPE ~ ., data = data_clean_i2, method = "both",seed = 1)$data

# data_balanced$Marketing_Flag=0
# data_balanced$Marketing_Flag[which(data_balanced$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP %in% c("Error/Other","Email","Organic Search"))]=1
# data_balanced=ovun.sample(Marketing_Flag ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data

prop.table(table(data_balanced$INTERACTION_FLAG)) #ok balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$EVENT_FLAG))  #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$DEVICE_TYPE)) #balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP))  #meh

data_balanced_i=data_balanced
save(data_balanced_i,file="data_balanced_i.RData")


###Under Sampling
# data_balanced_under <- ovun.sample(cls ~ ., data = hacide.train, method = "under", N = 40, seed = 1)$data
# table(data_balanced_under$cls)

###Over Sampling
# data_balanced_over <- ovun.sample(cls ~ ., data = hacide.train, method = "over",N = 1960)$data
# table(data_balanced_over$cls)

```

```{r EXPLORATORY: Check Consistency of Sample}
####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
#1 SETUP: Reformat Functions
#2 SETUP: Vars List
#3 SETUP: RF Functions



#RUNNNNNNNNN
#connect to database; open connection
require('ranger')
require("dplyr")


data_chunk=c('1 and 5000000','5000001 and 10000000', '10000001 and 15000000', '15000001 and 20000000', '20000001 and 25000000','25000001 and 30000000','30000001 and 35000000','35000001 and 40000000','40000001 and 45000000','45000001 and 50000000','50000001 and 55000000','55000001 and 60000000')

for(i in 1:length(data_chunk)){
  chunk=data_chunk[i]
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V4 WHERE SORT_NUM between ",chunk)

  ###Pull data from database
  total=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  total$EVENT_FLAG=as.factor(total$EVENT_FLAG)
  total$DEVICE_TYPE=as.factor(total$DEVICE_TYPE)
  total$PRICE_BAND=as.factor(total$PRICE_BAND)
  total$STATE_NAME=ifelse(is.na(total$STATE_NAME),"UNKNOWN",total$STATE_NAME)
  total$DISTRICT_NAME=ifelse(is.na(total$DISTRICT_NAME),"UNKNOWN",total$DISTRICT_NAME)
  total$ PURCHASE_FLAG=as.factor(total$ PURCHASE_FLAG)
  total$ ATC_FLAG=as.factor(total$ ATC_FLAG)
  total$ INTERACTION_FLAG=as.factor(total$ INTERACTION_FLAG)
  total$ FISCAL_DAY_NAME=as.factor(total$ FISCAL_DAY_NAME)
  total$ WEEKDAY_P=as.factor(total$ WEEKDAY_P)
  total$ STATE_NAME=as.factor(total$ STATE_NAME)
  total$ DISTRICT_NAME=as.factor(total$ DISTRICT_NAME)
  total$ ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP=as.factor(total$ ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP)
  total$ PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT=as.integer(total$ PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT)
  total$ PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT=as.integer(total$ PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT)
  total$ BRAND_CAT=as.factor(total$ BRAND_CAT)
  total$ SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG=as.factor(total$ SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG)
  total$ MAX_SKU_PRICE=as.numeric(total$ MAX_SKU_PRICE)
  total$ MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF=as.numeric(total$ MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF)
  total$ MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF=as.numeric(total$ MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF)
  #total$ TOTAL_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(total$ TOTAL_SKU_COUNT)
  total$ SALE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(total$ SALE_SKU_COUNT)
  total$ CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(total$ CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT)
  total$ SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(total$ SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT)
  total$ OUTLET_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(total$ OUTLET_SKU_COUNT)
  total$ REGULAR_SKU_COUNT=as.integer(total$ REGULAR_SKU_COUNT)
  total$ REVIEW_COUNT=as.integer(total$ REVIEW_COUNT)
  total$ REVIEW_SCORE=as.numeric(total$ REVIEW_SCORE)
  total$ GENDER=as.factor(total$ GENDER)
  total$ USA_FLAG=as.factor(total$ USA_FLAG)
  total$ CHINA_FLAG=as.factor(total$ CHINA_FLAG)
  total$ AGE_CATEGORY=as.factor(total$ AGE_CATEGORY)
  total$ SHOP_DESC=as.factor(total$ SHOP_DESC)
  # total$ SILHOUETTE_DESC=as.factor(total$ SILHOUETTE_DESC)
  # total$ VALUE_TIER_DESC=as.factor(total$ VALUE_TIER_DESC)
  # total$ PRIMARY_ACTIVITY_DESC=as.factor(total$ PRIMARY_ACTIVITY_DESC)
  # total$ SKILL_LEVEL_DESC=as.factor(total$ SKILL_LEVEL_DESC)
  total$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_60=as.integer(total$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_60)
  # total$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_30=as.integer(total$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_30)
  # total$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_10=as.integer(total$ SESSIONS_VIEWED_10)
  # total$ SESSIONS_CONV_60=as.integer(total$ SESSIONS_CONV_60)
  # total$ SESSIONS_CONV_30=as.integer(total$ SESSIONS_CONV_30)
  total$ SESSIONS_CONV_10=as.integer(total$ SESSIONS_CONV_10)
  total$SHOP_PRICE_AVG=as.numeric(total$SHOP_PRICE_AVG)
  #total$DEPT_PRICE_AVG=as.numeric(total$DEPT_PRICE_AVG)
  total$CLASS_PRICE_AVG=as.numeric(total$CLASS_PRICE_AVG)
  
  total$price_ratio_to_shop=total$ MAX_SKU_PRICE/total$SHOP_PRICE_AVG
  #total$price_ratio_to_dept=total$ MAX_SKU_PRICE/total$DEPT_PRICE_AVG
  total$price_ratio_to_class=total$ MAX_SKU_PRICE/total$CLASS_PRICE_AVG
  total$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL = as.factor(total$SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL)
  total$STORE_FLAG= as.factor(total$STORE_FLAG)
  total$ON_SALE_FLAG = as.factor(total$ON_SALE_FLAG)
  

  total_na=na.omit(total[,c(y,vars)])
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=total_na, train=.7)
  save(total_split,file = paste0("Total-",i,".RData"))
  
  output=rf_function(label=i, y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=total_split$train, vars=vars, test=total_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=50)
  save(output,file = paste0("TOTAL-",i,"_rfOutput.RData"))

}

```

```{r EXPLORATORY: Correlation on cont. vars}
load("~/SRW/Segment 1/total_split.RData")
total=rbind(total_split$train,total_split$test)
correlation=cor(total[,c('SESSIONS_VIEWED_60',
'SESSIONS_VIEWED_30',
'SESSIONS_VIEWED_10',
'SESSIONS_CONV_60',
'SESSIONS_CONV_30',
'SESSIONS_CONV_10')])

#keep SESSIONS_VIEWED_60 and SESSIONS_CONV_10?

corr2=cor(total[,c('PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT',
'PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT',
'MAX_SKU_PRICE',
'MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF',
'MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF',
'TOTAL_SKU_COUNT',
'SALE_SKU_COUNT',
'CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT',
'SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT',
'REGULAR_SKU_COUNT',
'REVIEW_COUNT',
'REVIEW_SCORE',
'SESSIONS_VIEWED_60',
'SESSIONS_CONV_10',
'price_ratio_to_shop',
'price_ratio_to_dept',
'price_ratio_to_class',
'size_percent')])

## TOTAL_SKU_COUNT x PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT
## REGULAR_SKU_COUNT x PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT
## TOTAL_SKU_COUNT x PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT
## price_ratio_to_shop x MAX_SKU_PRICE
## TOTAL_SKU_COUNT x REGULAR_SKU_COUNT
## price_ratio_to_dept x price_ratio_to_class

#DROP: TOTAL_SKU_COUNT, MAX_SKU_PRICE, price_ratio_to_dept

```

```{r Navigation Category Segments}
#Focus on:
#Camp and Hike, Cycle, Men, Women, Footwear
footwear_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Footwear / .+ Footwear /"),]
footwear_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Footwear / .+ Footwear /"),]

socks_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Footwear / Socks"),]
socks_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Footwear / Socks"),]


camp_elec_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Camping and Hiking / Camp Electronics"),]
camp_elec_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Camping and Hiking / Camp Electronics"),]

backpacks_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Camping and Hiking / Hiking Backpacks"),]
backpacks_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Camping and Hiking / Hiking Backpacks"),]

tents_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Camping and Hiking / Tents"),]
tents_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Camping and Hiking / Tents"),]


cycle_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Cycling"),]
cycle_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Cycling"),]

cycle_cloth_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Cycling / Cycling Clothing"),]
cycle_cloth_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Cycling / Cycling Clothing"),]

bikes_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Cycling / Bikes"),]
bikes_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Products / Cycling / Bikes"),]

women_access_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Women's" & data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]
women_access_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Women's" & data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]
women_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Women's"),]
women_p=women_p[-which(women_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]
women_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Women's"),]
women_i=women_i[-which(women_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]

men_access_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Men's" & data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]
men_access_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Men's" & data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]
men_p=data_clean_p[which(data_clean_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Men's"),]
men_p=men_p[-which(men_p$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]

men_i=data_clean_i[which(data_clean_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Men's"),]
men_i=men_i[-which(men_i$`Navigation Categories` %like% "Accessories"),]



```


```{r SETUP: Vars List}
vars=c("SIZE_COUNT",
  "SIZE_COUNT_180",
  "size_percent",
  "PRICE_BAND",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "STATE_NAME",
  "STORES_WITHIN_30MINS",
  "STORES_WITHIN_60MINS",
  "STORES_WITHIN_30MINS",
  "STORES_WITHIN_60MINS",
  "PURCHASE_FLAG",
  "ATC_FLAG",
  "INTERACTION_FLAG",
  "EVENT_FLAG",
  "ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP",
  "PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT",
  "PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT",
  "BRAND_CAT",
  "SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG",
  "FISCAL_DAY_NAME",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF",
  "MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF",
  "SALE_SKU_COUNT",
  "CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT",
  "SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT",
  "TOTAL_SKU_COUNT",
  "REGULAR_SKU_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_SCORE",
  "GENDER",
  "USA_FLAG",
  "CHINA_FLAG",
  "AGE_CATEGORY",
  "SHOP_DESC",
  "DEPARTMENT_DESC",
  "CLASS_DESC",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_60",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_10",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_30",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_30",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_10",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_60",
  "MAX_SKU_PRICE",
  "SHOP_PRICE_AVG",
  "DEPT_PRICE_AVG",
  "CLASS_PRICE_AVG",
  "AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT",
  "AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT",
  "AVG_DEPT_SKU_COUNT",
  "AVG_CLASS_SKU_COUNT",
  "sku_ratio_to_dept",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",
  "price_ratio_to_shop",
  "price_ratio_to_class",
  "price_ratio_to_dept",
  "SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL",
  "STORE_FLAG",
  "RR_FLAG",
  "ON_SALE_FLAG",
  "DEVICE_TYPE"
)


vars1= c("size_percent",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "EVENT_FLAG",
  "ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP",
  "PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT",
  "PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT",
  "BRAND_CAT",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "REVIEW_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_SCORE",
  "GENDER",
  "USA_FLAG",
  "CHINA_FLAG",
  "AGE_CATEGORY",
  "SESSIONS_VIEWED_60",
  "SESSIONS_CONV_60",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",
  "price_ratio_to_class",
  "ON_SALE_FLAG",
  "DEVICE_TYPE"
)

#balanced_p_split=split(seed=123, data=data_balanced_p, train=.7)
#balanced_i_split=split(seed=123, data=data_balanced_i, train=.7)
#balanced_a_split=split(seed=123, data=data_balanced_a, train=.7)
output_p1=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars1, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_a1=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars1, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_i1=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars1, test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_p1
output_a1
output_i1


varsi= c("SESSIONS_VIEWED_60",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",  
  "REVIEW_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_SCORE",
  "BRAND_CAT",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "DEVICE_TYPE",
  "EVENT_FLAG"
)
output_i2=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=varsi, test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_i2

varsp= c("SESSIONS_CONV_60",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",  
  "REVIEW_COUNT",
  "REVIEW_SCORE",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "EVENT_FLAG",
  "DEVICE_TYPE"
)
output_p3=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=varsp, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_a3=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=varsp, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_p3
output_a3

vars4= c("SESSIONS_CONV_60",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",  
  "BRAND_CAT",
  "ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "GENDER",
  "DEVICE_TYPE"
)
output_p4=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars4, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_a4=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars4, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_i4=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars4, test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_p4
output_a4
output_i4

vars5=c("SESSIONS_CONV_60",
  "DISTRICT_NAME",
  "sku_ratio_to_class",  
  "AGE_CATEGORY",
  "ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP",
  "WEEKDAY",
  "GENDER",
  "DEVICE_TYPE")
output_p5=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars5, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_a5=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars5, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_i5=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars5, test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)
output_p5
output_a5
output_i5


y=c('PURCHASE_FLAG', 'ATC_FLAG', 'INTERACTION_FLAG')

```


```{r EXPLORATORY: Overall Variable Importance}
####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
#1 SETUP: Reformat Functions
#2 SETUP: Vars List
#3 SETUP: RF Functions

require('ranger')
require("dplyr")


####### PURCHASE ########
#########################

#Split Data
balanced_p_split=split(seed=123, data=data_balanced_p, train=.7)
  
output_p3=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars3, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_p4=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars4, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_p1=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars1, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_p2=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=balanced_p_split$train, vars=vars2, test=balanced_p_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

write.csv(output_p3,"output_p3.csv")
write.csv(output_p1,"output_p1.csv")
write.csv(output_p2,"output_p2.csv")
write.csv(output_p4,"output_p4.csv")


####### ATC ########
####################
balanced_a_split=split(seed=123, data=data_balanced_a, train=.7)
  
output_a3=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars3, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_a4=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars4, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_a1=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars1, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_a2=rf_function(label="a", y="ACT_FLAG", data=balanced_a_split$train, vars=vars2, test=balanced_a_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

write.csv(output_a3,"output_a3.csv")
write.csv(output_a1,"output_a1.csv")
write.csv(output_a2,"output_a2.csv")
write.csv(output_a4,"output_a4.csv")

####### INTERACTION #####
#########################
TO_REMOVE=c("STORE_FLAG")
balanced_i_split=split(seed=123, data=data_balanced_i, train=.7)
  
output_i1=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars1[which(vars1!=TO_REMOVE)], test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_i2=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars2[which(vars2!=TO_REMOVE)], test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_i3=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars3[which(vars3!=TO_REMOVE)], test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

output_i4=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=balanced_i_split$train, vars=vars4[which(vars4!=TO_REMOVE)], test=balanced_i_split$test, seed=284, num.trees=70)

write.csv(output_i1,"output_i1.csv")
write.csv(output_i2,"output_i2.csv")
write.csv(output_i3,"output_i3.csv")
write.csv(output_i4,"output_i4.csv")


```

```{r Market Basket Analysis}
####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
#1 SETUP: Reformat Functions
#2 SETUP: Vars List

data_mba=reformat_mba(total=data)
TO_ADD=c("FISCAL_DAY_NAME","WEEKDAY_P")
TO_REMOVE=c("PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT","PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT","MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF","MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF","SALE_SKU_COUNT","CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT","SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT","REGULAR_SKU_COUNT","REVIEW_COUNT","REVIEW_SCORE","USA_FLAG","CHINA_FLAG","DEPARTMENT_DESC","SESSIONS_VIEWED_60","SESSIONS_CONV_10","price_ratio_to_shop","price_ratio_to_class")
data_mba_clean=data_mba[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)],TO_ADD)]


### Balance Data across Success Metrics
require("ROSE")
prop.table(table(data_mba_clean$PURCHASE_FLAG))  #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_mba_clean$ATC_FLAG))  #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_mba_clean$INTERACTION_FLAG))  #not balanced

#Under and Over Sampling
data_balanced=ovun.sample(INTERACTION_FLAG ~ ., data = data_mba_clean, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
data_balanced=ovun.sample(PURCHASE_FLAG ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
data_balanced=ovun.sample(ATC_FLAG ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data
data_balanced=ovun.sample(INTERACTION_FLAG ~ ., data = data_balanced, method = "both",seed = 1)$data

prop.table(table(data_balanced$PURCHASE_FLAG))  #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$ATC_FLAG))  #not balanced
prop.table(table(data_balanced$INTERACTION_FLAG))  #not balanced

data_mba=data_balanced
save(data_mba,file="Data_MBA.RData")

######## MBA ######
###################
require("arules")
explore_mba=as(data_mba,"transactions")

summary(explore_mba)

rules=apriori(explore_mba, parameter=list(supp=0.001,conf=0.6,minlen=1,maxlen=4))
inspect(head(rules,n=10))

write(rules,
      file = "MBA_Rules.csv",
      sep = ",",
      quote = TRUE,
      row.names = FALSE)

##Subsetting
rules.sub_DAY=sort(subset(rules, subset = (rhs %pin% c("WEEKDAY_P=") & !(lhs %pin% "FISCAL_DAY_NAME") )),by=c("confidence","lift","support"))
inspect(head(rules.sub_DAY,n=20))



```

```{r Random Forest - PURCHASE}
####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
#0 Connect to Server
#1 SETUP: Reformat Functions
#2 SETUP: Vars List
#3 SETUP: RF Functions


###### First Iteration #######
##############################

TO_REMOVE=c("EVENT_FLAG","DEVICE_TYPE","STATE_NAME","DISTRICT_NAME","STORES_WITHIN_30MINS","STORES_WITHIN_60MINS")

#### Segments
device=c("DESKTOP","MOBILE")
event=c(0,1)
col_names=c("device","event")
purchase_seg=expand.grid(device,event)
purchase_seg=output_table_setup(data=purchase_seg, col_names=col_names, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])


###### RUN MODEL
for(i in 1:nrow(purchase_seg)){
  Device=purchase_seg$device[i]
  Event=purchase_seg$event[i]
  
  # query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE DISTRICT_NAME='",District,"' AND ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP='",Marketing,"' AND trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event)
  
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event," ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 3000000")
  
  ###Pull data from database
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data$geo_group=geo_group(data=data)
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=10, success="PURCHASE_FLAG")
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="p", y="PURCHASE_FLAG", data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=937, num.trees=70)
  save(output,file=paste0("RFbalanced-output-P",i,".RData"))
  
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(purchase_seg)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      purchase_seg[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        purchase_seg[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(purchase_seg)[j]
      purchase_seg[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  save(purchase_seg, file="RF_balanced_2seg_P.RData")
  
}

save(purchase_seg, file="RF_balanced_2seg_P.RData"
     
     
     
     

###### Second Iteration #######
##############################
TO_REMOVE=c("EVENT_FLAG","DEVICE_TYPE","STATE_NAME","DISTRICT_NAME","STORES_WITHIN_30MINS","STORES_WITHIN_60MINS")

#### Segments
device=c("DESKTOP","MOBILE")
event=c(0)
marketing="NULL"
geo="NULL"
dept="NULL"

col_names=c("device","event","marketing","geo","dept")

purchase_seg=expand.grid(device,event,marketing,geo,dept)
purchase_seg=output_table_setup(data=purchase_seg, col_names=col_names, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])

###### RUN MODEL
run_model=function(segment=purchase_seg, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70){
  
  total_list=list()
for(i in 1:nrow(segment)){
  Device=segment$device[i]
  Event=segment$event[i]
  Marketing=segment$marketing[i]
  Geo=segment$geo[i]
  Dept=segment$dept[i]
  
  ###Pull data from database
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event," LIMIT 3000000")
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=seed, success=success)
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="-", y=success, data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=seed, num.trees=trees)
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(segment)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      segment[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        segment[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(segment)[j]
      segment[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  
}
  total_list$segment=segment
  return(total_list)
  
}
model_p_1=run_model(segment=purchase_seg, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70)


##########################################
TO_REMOVE=c("EVENT_FLAG","DEVICE_TYPE","STATE_NAME","DISTRICT_NAME","STORES_WITHIN_30MINS","STORES_WITHIN_60MINS","ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP","DEPARTMENT_DESC")

device=c("DESKTOP","MOBILE")
event=c(0,1)
marketing=c("Direct Load","Email","Online Marketing","Organic Search")


col_names=c("device","event","marketing")

purchase_seg=expand.grid(device,event,marketing)
purchase_seg=output_table_setup(data=purchase_seg, col_names=col_names, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])

###### RUN MODEL
run_model=function(segment=purchase_seg, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70){
  
  total_list=list()
for(i in 1:nrow(segment)){
  Device=segment$device[i]
  Event=segment$event[i]
  Marketing=segment$marketing[i]
  
  ###Pull data from database
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event," AND ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP='",Marketing,"' LIMIT 3000000")
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=seed, success=success)
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="-", y=success, data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=seed, num.trees=trees)
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(segment)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      segment[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        segment[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(segment)[j]
      segment[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  
}
  total_list$segment=segment
  return(total_list)
  
}
model_p_2=run_model(segment=purchase_seg, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70)


###############################
TO_REMOVE=c("EVENT_FLAG","DEVICE_TYPE","STATE_NAME","DISTRICT_NAME","STORES_WITHIN_30MINS","STORES_WITHIN_60MINS","ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP","GEO_CODE")

device=c("MOBILE")
event=c(1)
marketing=c("Direct Load","Email","Online Marketing","Organic Search")
geo=c(1,2,3,4,5)
dept="NULL"

col_names=c("device","event","marketing","geo","dept")

purchase_seg=expand.grid(device,event,marketing,geo,dept)
purchase_seg=output_table_setup(data=purchase_seg, col_names=col_names, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])

###### RUN MODEL
run_model=function(segment=purchase_seg, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70){
  
  total_list=list()
for(i in 1:nrow(segment)){
  Device=segment$device[i]
  Event=segment$event[i]
  Marketing=segment$marketing[i]
  Geo=segment$geo[i]
  Dept=segment$dept[i]
  
  ###Pull data from database
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event," AND ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP='",Marketing,"' AND GEO_CODE=",Geo," LIMIT 3000000")
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=seed, success=success)
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="-", y=success, data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=seed, num.trees=trees)
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(segment)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      segment[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        segment[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(segment)[j]
      segment[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  
}
  total_list$segment=segment
  return(total_list)
  
}
model_p_3=run_model(segment=purchase_seg, vars=vars, TO_REMOVE=TO_REMOVE, success="PURCHASE_FLAG", seed=707, trees=70)



######## Cobble Together Results #######
########################################
m1_p=model_p_1$segment
m2_p=model_p_2$segment
m3_p=model_p_3$segment
save(m1_p,file="RF_Purchase_2iter_1.RData")
save(m2_p,file="RF_Purchase_2iter_2.RData")
save(m3_p,file="RF_Purchase_2iter_3.RData")
write.csv(m1_p,"RF_m1_p.csv")
write.csv(m2_p,"RF_m2_p.csv")
write.csv(m3_p,"RF_m3_p.csv")



```

```{r Random Forest - ATC}

####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
#0 Connect to Server
#1 SETUP: Reformat Functions
#2 SETUP: Vars List
#3 SETUP: RF Functions


###### First Iteration #######
##############################

TO_REMOVE=c("EVENT_FLAG","DEVICE_TYPE","STATE_NAME","DISTRICT_NAME","STORES_WITHIN_30MINS","STORES_WITHIN_60MINS")

#### Segments
device=c("DESKTOP","MOBILE")
event=c(0,1)
col_names=c("device","event")
atc_seg=expand.grid(device,event)
atc_seg=output_table_setup(data=atc_seg, col_names=col_names, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])


###### RUN MODEL
for(i in 1:nrow(atc_seg)){
  Device=atc_seg$device[i]
  Event=atc_seg$event[i]
  
  # query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE DISTRICT_NAME='",District,"' AND ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP='",Marketing,"' AND trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event)
  
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event," ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 3000000")
  
  ###Pull data from database
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data$geo_group=geo_group(data=data)
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=10, success="ATC_FLAG")
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="a", y="ATC_FLAG", data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=937, num.trees=70)
  save(output,file=paste0("RFbalanced-output-A",i,".RData"))
  
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(atc_seg)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      atc_seg[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        atc_seg[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(atc_seg)[j]
      atc_seg[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  save(atc_seg, file="RF_balanced_2seg_A.RData")
  
}

save(atc_seg, file="RF_balanced_2seg_A.RData"

```

```{r RF - Interaction}
####### RUN FIRST #######
########################
#0 Connect to Server
#1 SETUP: Reformat Functions
#2 SETUP: Vars List
#3 SETUP: RF Functions


###### First Iteration #######
##############################

TO_REMOVE=c("STORE_FLAG","EVENT_FLAG","DEVICE_TYPE","STATE_NAME","DISTRICT_NAME","STORES_WITHIN_30MINS","STORES_WITHIN_60MINS")

#### Segments
device=c("DESKTOP","MOBILE")
event=c(0,1)
col_names=c("device","event")
interaction_seg=expand.grid(device,event)
interaction_seg=output_table_setup(data=interaction_seg, col_names=col_names, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])


###### RUN MODEL
for(i in 1:nrow(interaction_seg)){
  Device=interaction_seg$device[i]
  Event=interaction_seg$event[i]
  
  # query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE DISTRICT_NAME='",District,"' AND ORIGINATION_MARKETING_PROGRAM_ROLLUP='",Marketing,"' AND trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event)
  
  query=paste0("SELECT * FROM DIGITAL_RETAIL_ANALYSIS..AK_RESEARCH_DATASET_SPRING_V2 WHERE trim(DEVICE_TYPE)='",Device,"' AND EVENT_FLAG=",Event," ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 3000000")
  
  ###Pull data from database
  data=nzQuery(query)
  
  ###Reformat vars
  data=reformat_rf(data=data)
  
  #Add Vars & Balance
  data$geo_group=geo_group(data=data)
  data_filter=data[,c(y,vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)])]
  data_na=balanceIt(data=data_filter, seed=10, success="INTERACTION_FLAG")
  
  #Split Data
  total_split=split(seed=123, data=data_na, train=.7)
  output=rf_function(label="i", y="INTERACTION_FLAG", data=total_split$train, vars=vars[-which(vars %in% TO_REMOVE)], test=total_split$test, seed=937, num.trees=70)
  save(output,file=paste0("RFbalanced-output-I",i,".RData"))
  
  
  for(j in (length(col_names)+1):ncol(interaction_seg)){
    if(j==(length(col_names)+1)){
      interaction_seg[i,j]=nrow(total_split$train)
    } else if(j==(length(col_names)+2)){
        interaction_seg[i,j]=output$accuracy[2]
    } else{
      column=colnames(interaction_seg)[j]
      interaction_seg[i,column]=match(column,rownames(output$imp))
    }
  }
  save(interaction_seg, file="RF_balanced_2seg_I.RData")
  
}

save(interaction_seg, file="RF_balanced_2seg_I.RData"

```

```{r Cluster}
###### CLUSTER ######
#####################
#all 'Other/Error' marketing had 0% model accuracy; remove from clustering

str(purchase_seg)
#purchase_seg_filter=purchase_seg[which(purchase_seg$accuracy>0),]
#Elbow Method
k.max=15
sample_p=purchase_seg[,7:ncol(purchase_seg)]
wss=sapply(1:k.max, 
           function(k){kmeans(sample_p, k, iter.max = 15)$tot.withinss})
plot(1:k.max, wss,
     type="b", pch = 19, frame = FALSE, 
     xlab="Number of clusters K",
     ylab="Total within-clusters sum of squares")

#kmeans
centers=4
k_model=kmeans(sample_p, centers=centers)

purchase_seg_cluster=data.frame(purchase_seg, cluster=k_model$cluster)

purchase_group1=purchase_seg_cluster[which(purchase_seg_cluster$cluster==1),]
  summary(purchase_group1)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1$event))*100

purchase_group2=purchase_seg_cluster[which(purchase_seg_cluster$cluster==2),]
  summary(purchase_group2)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2$event))*100
  
purchase_group3=purchase_seg_cluster[which(purchase_seg_cluster$cluster==3),]
  summary(purchase_group3)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3$event))*100

purchase_group4=purchase_seg_cluster[which(purchase_seg_cluster$cluster==4),]
  summary(purchase_group4)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group4$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group4$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group4$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group4$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group4$event))*100


#LCA
#install.packages("poLCA")
require("poLCA")
sample_f=as.data.frame(lapply(sample_p, factor))

seg.f=with(sample_f, cbind(PRICE_BAND,PRODUCT_PAGE_SIZE_COUNT,PRODUCT_PAGE_COLOR_COUNT,BRAND_CAT, SEARCH_ENTRY_FLAG,MAX_SKU_PERCENT_OFF,MIN_SKU_PERCENT_OFF,
SALE_SKU_COUNT,CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT,SUPER_CLEARANCE_SKU_COUNT,REGULAR_SKU_COUNT,
REVIEW_COUNT,REVIEW_SCORE,GENDER,USA_FLAG,
CHINA_FLAG,AGE_CATEGORY,SHOP_DESC,price_ratio_to_shop,
price_ratio_to_class,size_percent,SIZE_COMPLETENESS_LEVEL,STORE_FLAG,
ON_SALE_FLAG,SESSIONS_CONV_10,SESSIONS_VIEWED_60)~1)

centers=4
lca_model=poLCA(seg.f,data=sample_f, nclass=centers)

purchase_seg_lca=data.frame(purchase_seg, cluster=lca_model$predclass)

purchase_group1_lca=purchase_seg_lca[which(purchase_seg_lca$cluster==1),]
  summary(purchase_group1_lca)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1_lca$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1_lca$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1_lca$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1_lca$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group1_lca$event))*100


purchase_group2_lca=purchase_seg_lca[which(purchase_seg_lca$cluster==2),]
  #summary(purchase_group2_lca)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2_lca$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2_lca$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2_lca$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2_lca$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group2_lca$event))*100
  
purchase_group3_lca=purchase_seg_lca[which(purchase_seg_lca$cluster==3),]
  #summary(purchase_group3_lca)
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3_lca$district))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3_lca$weekday))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3_lca$marketing))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3_lca$device))*100
  prop.table(table(purchase_group3_lca$event))*100
  
#purchase_group4_lca=purchase_seg_lca[which(purchase_seg_lca$cluster==4),]
#summary(purchase_group4_lca)




###### NEW SEGMENTS ######
##########################
district2=c("Bay+CalNev+UNKNOWN", "All Others")
weekday2=c("Monday","Midweek","Friday","Weekend")
marketing2=c("Email","Direct Load","Online+Organic")
device2=c("DESKTOP","MOBILE")
event2=c(0,1)

  
purchase_seg2=expand.grid(district2,weekday2,marketing2,device2,event2)
#96 combos

```

```{r RF Tree Interpreter}
#install.packages("tree.interpreter")
require("tree.interpreter")

forest=tidyRF(rf_ranger,total_split$train[,vars],total_split$train[,"INTERACTION_FLAG"])
featureContrib(forest)
trainsetBias(forest)
MDIoob(forest, total_split$train[,vars],total_split$train[,"INTERACTION_FLAG"])

```

```{r Var Importance Plot}
## Plot Importance Vars
plot(ggplot(imp_ranger_frame[1:20,,drop = FALSE], aes(x=reorder(rownames(imp_ranger_frame[1:20,,drop = FALSE]),imp_ranger[1:20,drop = FALSE]), y=imp_ranger[1:20,drop = FALSE],fill=imp_ranger))+ 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+ coord_flip()+
  ylab("Variable Importance")+
  xlab("Variables")+
  ggtitle(paste0(label))+
  labs(subtitle="Gini Impurity: Mean Decrease")+
  scale_fill_gradient(low="red", high="blue")
  )
```

```{r Tree Plot Code}
#Tree values
tree=treeInfo(rf_ranger,1)
tree=tree%>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column() %>%
    mutate(splitval= ifelse(is.na(prediction), splitval, NA))
graph_frame=data.frame(from = rep(tree$rowname, 2),
                            to = c(tree$leftChild, tree$rightChild))
graph=graph_from_data_frame(graph_frame) %>%
    delete_vertices("NA")

V(graph)$node_label=as.character(tree$splitvarName)
V(graph)$leaf_label=as.character(tree$prediction)
V(graph)$split=as.character(round(tree$splitval, digits = 2))
plot=ggraph(graph, 'dendrogram') + 
    theme_bw() +
    geom_edge_link() +
    geom_node_point() +
    geom_node_text(aes(label = node_label), na.rm = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
    geom_node_label(aes(label = split), vjust = 2.5, na.rm = TRUE, fill = "white") +
    geom_node_label(aes(label = leaf_label, fill = leaf_label), na.rm = TRUE, 
					repel = TRUE, colour = "white", fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
```
